allow: PowerShell(node -e "const p=require\('c:/repos/astro-blog-starter-template01/content-plan.json'\); console.log\('first 10:'\); p.slice\(0,10\).forEach\(\(e,i\)=>console.log\(i, e.publishDate.slice\(0,13\), e.cluster.padEnd\(30\), e.slug, e.pillar?'PILLAR':''\)\); const days={}; let sameDay=0; for\(let i=0;i+1<p.length;i+=2\){ if\(p[i].cluster===p[i+1].cluster\) sameDay++ } console.log\('same-cluster same-day pairs:', sameDay\); let maxRun=1,run=1; for\(let i=1;i<p.length;i++\){ if\(p[i].cluster===p[i-1].cluster\){run++; maxRun=Math.max\(maxRun,run\)}else run=1 } console.log\('max consecutive same cluster:', maxRun\); console.log\('pillar positions:', p.map\(\(e,i\)=>e.pillar?i:null\).filter\(x=>x!==null\).join\(','\)\)")

PowerShell("=== dist/index.html meta tags ==="; Select-String -Path dist\\index.html -Pattern 'impact-site-verification|monetag' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) }; "=== ellenorzes egy masik oldalon \(about\) ==="; Select-String -Path dist\\about\\index.html -Pattern 'impact-site-verification|monetag' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) }; "=== published blog articles in dist ==="; \(Get-ChildItem dist\\blog -Directory\).Count)

PowerShell(npx astro build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; "=== /about meta ==="; Select-String -Path dist\\about\\index.html -Pattern 'impact-site-verification|monetag' | ForEach-Object { \($_.Line -split '><' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'impact-site|monetag' }\) -join "`n" })

PowerShell(npx astro build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; "in-page push tag still present \(homepage\): " + \(Select-String -Path dist\\index.html -Pattern 'nap5k\\.com/tag\\.min\\.js' -AllMatches\).Matches.Count)

PowerShell($files = "how-to-read-a-solar-quote","solar-savings-without-net-metering","electricity-rate-increases-solar-payback","15kw-solar-system","water-heater-electricity-usage","solar-panels-metal-roof","solar-battery-lifespan-cycles","inverter-cec-vs-peak-efficiency","solar-site-survey","solar-panel-pest-damage"; foreach \($f in $files\) { $p = "C:\\repos\\astro-blog-starter-template01\\src\\content\\blog\\$f.md"; $lines = Get-Content $p; $bodyStart = \($lines | Select-String -Pattern '^---$' | Select-Object -Index 1\).LineNumber; $body = $lines[$bodyStart..\($lines.Count-1\)] -join ' '; $wc = \($body -split '\\s+' | Where-Object { $_ -ne '' }\).Count; "{0,-42} {1}" -f $f, $wc })
